name: next_steps
description: Actions or tasks that emerge from the decision. May be empty if the decision itself is the action.

aiGuidance.purpose: Capture what still needs to happen after the decision is made.
aiGuidance.extraction: List named actions with owners where stated. If none are present, leave empty.
aiGuidance.negativeGuidance: Do not restate the decision. Only record what needs to happen as a result of it.
